name: process_near_miss_investigation_step2
description: Document sequence of events and initial findings

investigation_findings.reasoning: Captures the basic facts and timeline of the incident

sequence_of_events.description: Detailed chronological sequence of events leading to and during the incident
sequence_of_events.reasoning: Essential for understanding how the incident unfolded and identifying potential causes

location_info.reasoning: Precise location details help in understanding the context and environment of the incident

plant_department.description: Department or area where incident occurred
plant_department.reasoning: Identifies the organizational unit responsible for the area

exact_location.reasoning: Pinpoints the exact location for investigation and future reference

equipment.reasoning: Documents specific equipment details for maintenance and prevention

tag_no.reasoning: Unique identifier for tracking and maintenance records

description.reasoning: Provides context about equipment type and function

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation of findings, location details, and equipment identification
reasoning.reasoning: Documents the rationale for sequence of events interpretation, location assessment, and equipment identification to ensure completeness and accuracy
